memoryArtifacts.headline: Gwynedd Wales. Gwenllian ferch Gruffydd, 'the lost warrior Princess of Wales" was Cristin Verch Gronwy(Gruffydd)'s great grand daughter.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Cristin ferch Gronwy於大約1105年出生在英國威爾斯福林爾時，她的父親Gronwy ab Owain34歲，母親Princess Genilles Verch Hoedlyw30歲。她和Owain Gwynedd King of all Wales至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1175年在威爾士凱爾納方史爾班格爾享年71歲。

zh-hans.Conwy, Caernarfonshire, Wales: 威尔士凱爾納方史爾康維
zh-hans.Bangor, Caernarfonshire, Wales: 威尔士凱爾納方史爾班格爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cristin ferch Gronwy于大约1105年出生在英国威尔斯福林爾时，她的父亲Gronwy ab Owain34岁，母亲Princess Genilles Verch Hoedlyw30岁。她和Owain Gwynedd King of all Wales至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1175年在威尔士凱爾納方史爾班格爾享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: German: occupational name for a ferryman, Middle High German verje, verge.

nameMeanings.name: Gronwy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Gronow
meanings: Welsh: relationship name from the Welsh personal name Goronwy (also found as Gronw and Gronow, from Old Welsh Guorgonui).

nameMeanings.name: Cristin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Crispinus, a derivative of the old Roman family name Crispus ‘curly(-headed)’. St Crispin was martyred with his brother Crispinian in c.285 , and the pair were popular saints in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Cristin ferch Gronwy was born about 1105, in Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Gronwy ab Owain, was 34 and her mother, Princess Genilles Verch Hoedlyw, was 30. She had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Owain Gwynedd King of all Wales. She died in 1175, in Bangor, Caernarfonshire, Wales, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cristin ferch Gronwy est née environ 1105, à Flintshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gronwy ab Owain, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Princess Genilles Verch Hoedlyw, avait 30 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Owain Gwynedd King of all Wales. Elle est décédée en 1175, à Bangor, Caernarfonshire, Galles, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cristin ferch Gronwy um 1105 in Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gronwy ab Owain 34 und ihre Mutter Princess Genilles Verch Hoedlyw 30. Sie hatte mit Owain Gwynedd King of all Wales mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1175 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Bangor, Caernarfonshire, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cristin ferch Gronwy è nata il circa 1105 nel Flintshire, Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, Gronwy ab Owain, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Princess Genilles Verch Hoedlyw, aveva 30 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Owain Gwynedd King of all Wales. Morì nel 1175, nel Bangor, Caernarfonshire, Galles, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Cristin ferch Gronwyが約1105年にイギリスウェールズフリントシュアイアで生まれた時，父Gronwy ab Owainは34歳，母Princess Genilles Verch Hoedlywは30歳であった。彼女はOwain Gwynedd King of all Walesとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1175年にウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアバンゴルで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Cristin ferch Gronwy(이)가 대략 1105년 영국 웨일스 플린츠히르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gronwy ab Owain(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Princess Genilles Verch Hoedlyw(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 Owain Gwynedd King of all Wales(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1175년 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르 방어에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cristin ferch Gronwy nasceu aproximadamente 1105, em Flintshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gronwy ab Owain, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Princess Genilles Verch Hoedlyw, tinha 30 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Owain Gwynedd King of all Wales. Ela faleceu em 1175, em Bangor, Caernarfonshire, Gales, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cristin ferch Gronwy родилась около 1105 г. в местности флинцхир, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Gronwy ab Owain было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Princess Genilles Verch Hoedlyw, 30. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Owain Gwynedd King of all Wales. Она умерла в 1175 г. в местности бангор, каирнарфоншир, Уэльс в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cristin ferch Gronwy nació aproximadamente 1105, en Flintshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Gronwy ab Owain, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Princess Genilles Verch Hoedlyw, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Owain Gwynedd King of all Wales. Murió en 1175, en Bangor, Caernarfonshire, Gales, a la edad de 71 años.
